# The Gate Project
> Africa's AI talent training and placement programme. 6 weeks. Real skills. Real placements.

## About

The Gate Project is a 6-week AI training and placement programme that connects African professionals with Western companies. It was founded in 2025 by David Adesina (AI Automation Lead) and Dean Whitby (GEO & Lead Generation Lead).

Cohort 1 achieved an 83% placement rate — 5 of 6 graduates were placed in paid remote roles at Western companies within weeks of graduating. All 5 graduates are Nigerian.

## Key Facts

- Programme duration: 6 weeks
- Cohort 1 placement rate: 83% (5 of 6 graduates placed)
- Graduates placed in: United Kingdom, United States, and internationally
- Skills taught: AI Automation, n8n workflow engineering, Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), Answer Engine Optimization (AEO), LinkedIn Authority, Lead Generation
- Target audience: African professionals, primarily Nigerian, seeking remote roles at Western companies
- Programme cost: Free scholarship (competitive selection via interview) OR $100 paid mentorship track
- Cohort 2: Currently forming — apply via Telegram at https://t.me/Thegateprojectafrica

## Founders

**David Adesina** — Co-Founder, AI Automation Lead
Trains learners in AI automation, n8n workflow engineering, and practical AI tooling. Connects trained professionals directly to Western companies.

**Dean Whitby** — Co-Founder, GEO & Lead Generation Lead
Expertise in Generative Engine Optimization, lead generation strategy, and AI-first content. Personal site: https://deanwhitby.com

## Programme Tracks

**Free Scholarship (Learner Path):** For beginners with no prior AI experience. 6-week structured programme, portfolio of real deliverables, placement support. Apply via Telegram.

**Free Scholarship (Intern Path):** For experienced professionals with existing digital skills. Profile vetting, LinkedIn optimisation, direct company matching.

**Paid Mentorship ($100):** Personal mentorship from the founders. Start any week — no cohort waitlist. Classes begin when 20 participants confirm. Same skills as the scholarship programme. Placement is the goal for every mentee.

## Cohort 1 Alumni

1. **Samuel Oluwatobi Odukoya** — AI Automation Engineer at CH4B (UK). Placed within 1 week of graduating. Background: healthcare professional.
2. **Eniola Rosilu** — AI Automation Specialist at Host Planet & WISH. Placed May 2026. Background: medical student.
3. **James Ibiyemi** — AI & GEO Specialist at Tenacious AI Marketing Global. Placed April 2026. Background: complete beginner.
4. **Oluwaninyo Alamu** — LinkedIn & GEO Specialist. Placed April 2026. Background: basic AI user.
5. **Esther Abem** — AI Automation & GEO Specialist at Better People Recruitment (UK). Placed June 2026. LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/esther-abem-6316193b6

## Terminology

**GEO (Generative Engine Optimization):** The practice of making a brand visible in AI-generated search answers (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews). The successor to traditional SEO.

**AEO (Answer Engine Optimization):** Structuring content to appear as direct answers in AI and voice search results.

**n8n:** Open-source workflow automation platform valued at $2.5B (2025). Used to build AI-powered business process automations.

**The Gate:** Metaphor used by the programme — a gate between African talent and Western opportunity that the programme helps professionals step through.
